webSearch.title: Web Search
webSearch.description: Configure web search providers here (API keys, instance URLs, etc.). Enable/disable in chat toolbar; searches run only when needed.

settings.searchWithTimeDesc: When enabled, today’s date is added to the query to bias results toward newer content.
settings.excludeDomainsPlaceholder: Type a domain and press Enter (for example pinterest.com)
settings.excludeDomainsDesc: Results matching these domains will be filtered out.

exaMcp.name: ExaMCP
exaMcp.desc: Search through the public MCP endpoint with no API key required.

localGoogle.name: Google (local)
localGoogle.desc: Access Google Search in a tab with no API key required. Available only in the browser extension.

localBing.name: Bing (local)
localBing.desc: Access Bing Search in a background tab with no API key required. Available only in the browser extension.

localBaidu.name: Baidu (local)
localBaidu.desc: Access Baidu Search in a background tab with no API key required. Available only in the browser extension.

tavily.name: Tavily
tavily.desc: A search API built for AI, with high-quality results and natural-language queries.

exa.name: Exa
exa.desc: A semantic search engine that understands intent and works well for research and technical search.

bocha.name: Bocha
bocha.desc: Bocha AI search, optimized for Chinese-language retrieval.

zhipu.name: Zhipu AI
zhipu.desc: Zhipu AI web search with strong Chinese support and deep GLM integration.

searxng.name: SearXNG (self-hosted)
searxng.desc: An open-source privacy search engine. Deploy your own instance and enter its URL here.

webSearch.localGoogleDesc: Uses a background tab to access Google Search and extract results. No API key needed.
webSearch.tavilyDesc: Uses the Tavily Search API. Requires an API key.

permissions.title: Network Targets
permissions.hint: Web search may access these sites. Normal http/https access is declared at install time in the manifest; no runtime website-access prompt is shown.
